content.introduction: Ongoing geopolitical tensions and macroeconomic uncertainty have led to increased risk aversion, with Kalshi forecasting Bitcoin to drop to $59,000 amid rising market volatility. Traders on the platform are pricing in a deeper pullback, reflecting shifting sentiment.
body: Geopolitical tensions and macroeconomic uncertainties may lead to increased risk aversion, affecting crypto market sentiment and stability.

Kalshi Traders Are Pricing In a Deeper Drop. - Kalshi traders predict BitcoinBTC-- could drop to $59,000 amid rising volatility and risk aversion in crypto markets. - Increased demand for downside contracts and higher put premiums reflect defensive positioning as traders adjust risk exposure. - Macroeconomic uncertainty and interest rate dynamics drive shifting sentiment, with prediction markets tracking real-time expectations. - Recent liquidations reduced leveraged positions, altering market structure while $59,000 remains a key psychological support level. Kalshi traders are pricing in a possible BitcoinBTC-- drop to $59,000 as volatility and risk aversion rise across crypto markets. Data from the regulated prediction market shows growing expectations that Bitcoin could fall toward that level within a defined period. The forecast reflects shifting sentiment after weeks of volatility and recent liquidation-driven moves across crypto markets. The increased demand for downside contracts suggests that traders are adjusting their risk exposure amid high uncertainty. Prediction markets like Kalshi are being watched as a real-time tool for assessing market sentiment.
